visualGoal: Show a budget-first buyer that real direct drive is genuinely affordable, then make the value sweet spot (MOZA R12) feel like the obvious ~$100 stretch. Real product proof at every rung; no procedural art.

realProductPhotosNeeded.notes: Cheapest real DD, headline verdict pick. Text-only in body because no verified image. Needs a real integrated-wheel photo before it can appear as a gearpick/shotgrid or be certified.
Fanatec wildcard section. Text-only in body; explicitly noted inline that we lack a verified photo and pointed to the Amazon listing. Needs a real base photo before it can become a body visual.

editorialCompositePrompts.prompt: Realistic Gen X garage sim-racing bench at golden-hour rim light, a compact entry-level wheel-stand with an empty mounting plate left open for a real budget wheelbase product overlay, price-tag props implying under-$400, curator Duke Alvarez leaning in with approachable mechanic energy, no fake branded hardware, no fake UI, 16:9 editorial cover.
editorialCompositePrompts.negativePrompt: fake logos, fake wheelbase, warped controls, impossible ergonomics, tiny unreadable text, procedural gradient art

infographicPrompts.title: The budget DD ladder, cheapest to sweet spot
infographicPrompts.style: IgnitionSim command-center ladder chart, large readable text, racing colors, R12 rung highlighted as the value stretch, real base photos as row markers for Codex overlay

infographicPrompts.title: What you give up at the bottom (and what you don't)
infographicPrompts.style: Two-column keep/lose chart, green vs amber, product-photo placeholders for Codex overlays

curatorScenePrompts.prompt: Realistic adult Gen X sim-racing curator Duke Alvarez in a clean garage cockpit bay, one hand resting on a compact entry direct-drive base, honest-broker expression as if talking a buyer out of overspending, product overlay space beside him, practical not fantasy, 4:5 portrait.

openQuestions: Current GT DD Pro bundle sale price (quoted $700/$850 from official pages, flagged check-current)?
